# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
parameters:
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_DS1_v2"
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: User name for the Virtual Machine.
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Password for the Virtual Machine.
  dnsLabelPrefix:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Unique DNS Name for the Public IP used to access the Virtual Machine.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources.

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2019-11-01"
  name: vnet
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - 10.0.0.0/16
    subnets:
      - name: default
        properties:
          addressPrefix: 10.0.0.0/24

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
  apiVersion: "2019-11-01"
  name: nic
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'vnet')]"
  properties:
    ipConfigurations:
      - name: ipconfig1
        properties:
          privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
          subnet:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', 'vnet', 'default')]"

- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: webVM
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  dependsOn:
    - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic')]"
  properties:
    hardwareProfile:
      vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
    osProfile:
      computerName: "webVM"
      adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
      adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
    storageProfile:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2019-Datacenter
        version: latest
      osDisk:
        name: "osdisk"
        caching: ReadWrite
        createOption: FromImage
      dataDisks:
        - lun: 0
          diskSizeGB: 128
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
          caching: None
          createOption: Empty
    networkProfile:
      networkInterfaces:
        - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic')]"
          primary: true

outputs:
  vmName:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', 'webVM')).osProfile.computerName]"
  publicIpAddress:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat('nicPublicIp')), '2019-11-01').ipAddress]"
